para_trans: PM Unity Alert with respect to operation, management and maintenance of Unity Mall.
Government of Maharashtra
Industries, Energy, Labour and Mining Department,
Government Decision No. : Narrow - 2025 / Q. 139 / Industry - 6
Madam Cama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400 032.
Date: May 20, 2026
CHAPTER: 1. Department of Expenditure, Ministry of Finance, Government of India Letter No. 44 (1) / 0a - 9/2023-24 (CAPEX) (Pt. ) Dated 16/06/2023.
2. Letter No. SOAD-3325 / Sec. 2110 / Nov. 10 of the Urban Development Department. 24/11/2025.
Introduction: Under the Central Government's "Special Assistance to States for Capital Investments Scheme 2023-24" in each of the States

"PM Unity Mall" is proposed to be constructed. The guidelines of the scheme and m. The Unity Mall is being constructed by Cidco Corporation as per the suggestions of Chief Secretary Mahadeyankadil in his recent meeting. One stall is proposed for each state / UT and one for each district of the state and the construction of Unity Mall will be completed. It is expected to be completed by February 15, 2026. Regarding the operation, management and maintenance of PM Ekta Mall, Shri. The meeting was chaired by the Chief Secretary. The government was considering setting up the committee as per the directions given in the meetings held on 27th November, 2025 to work out the modalities regarding operation, management and maintenance of "PM Unity Mall."

Government Decision: - Managing Director, Maharashtra Small Industries Development Corporation is being appointed as the Nodal Officer for smooth functioning, management and maintenance of PM Ekta Mall.

The Managing Director, Maharashtra Small Industries Development Corporation is being authorised to accept the transfer of PM Ekta Mall from Cidco Corporation to the Industries Department in the prescribed manner. The Managing Director, Maharashtra Small Industries Development Corporation should take necessary action for power connection and other ancillary matters for PM Ekta Mall.
The following Committee is being constituted under the Chairmanship of Development Commissioner (Industries) to work out the modalities for operation, management and maintenance of PM Ekta Mall.
The functions of the committee are: 1) To formulate policy and implement procedures with regard to the operation, management and maintenance of PoM Ekta Mall.
table_trans: Founder Director, Maharashtra Small Industries Development Corporation
Main functions Maharashtra State Khadi and Village Industries Board
Additional Development Commissioner (Industries), Directorate of Industries
Joint Director of Industries (01) 0), Directorate of Industries, Mumbai

para_trans: 2) Pursuant to the guidelines of the Central Government, the Public Private Partnership (PPP) model of operation, management and maintenance of PM Ekta Mall should be followed.
Duration: Until June 30, 2026.

The following District Level Committee is being constituted under the Chairmanship of the District Collectors of the respective districts to decide on the distribution of stalls to be allotted to the districts in PM Ekta Mall.
The function of the committee: To select the product and manufacturer of the district to be displayed in the stalls put up by the district at PM Ekta Mall.
Duration: Until June 30, 2026.
The Government Circular was made available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
table_trans: District Coordinators are Women Development Corporation.
With the approval of other departments
